meta.title: DEF CON 29 BIC Village - Keith Chapman - The Action Plan for Cyber Diversity
meta.description: What does it take to increase diversity, equity, and inclusion in information security? An inside perspective with actionable steps. These actions will build a stronger defense and future for us all.
